title: lyonia racemosa
intro: Lyonia racemosa, also known as the Frostweed or Panicle Berry, is a deciduous shrub native to eastern North America. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lyonia racemosa include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Lyonia racemosa include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, including fever, sore throats, and digestive issues.
